title: Rebuild shipping goes here
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild shipping goes here. (Warning: SPOILERS)             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 26, 2009 6:27 pm I'm hoping neither Shinji OR Asuka flee the scene during the whole "mama" sequence, whether or not it includes the almost kiss attempt and Wall of Jericho scenes. That'd be a nice difference if they both stayed this time around. And in case I didn't clarify if before, I'm 80% certain we'll at least be getting the Asuka/Shinji kiss scene, even if we don't get the almost kiss scene.

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Fri Jun 26, 2009 6:32 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I'm 80% certain we'll at least be getting the Asuka/Shinji kiss scene, even if we don't get the almost kiss scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Megashadow13 » Fri Jun 26, 2009 6:40 pm JimmyWolk wrote: Sailor Star Dust wrote: I'm 80% certain we'll at least be getting the Asuka/Shinji kiss scene, even if we don't get the almost kiss scene.

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Fri Jun 26, 2009 6:59 pm Megashadow13 wrote: but yea im with SSD on this one, cmon jimmy, i was just not expecting you of all people to dont have high hopes on the SxA in the movie XD

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Fri Jun 26, 2009 7:04 pm I wouldn't be surprised if there is no kiss, the manga skipped out on it.... they probably wanna mix it up. Maybe Mari kisses him It's gonna get bloody

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 26, 2009 7:05 pm Whole Asuka + Shinji thing (we're really off topic here by way, how this hasn't been locked is beyond me) couldn't give two shits. I'd rather Anno deliver a great continuation of the story set up in 1.0 than waste time fanwanking with "Asuka & Shinji lovey lovey". But that's just me.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Jun 26, 2009 7:20 pm Perhaps a thread split is in due order then, rather than simply locking the topic.

[]:             Quote Post by DummyPlug » Fri Jun 26, 2009 7:56 pm Some people are AxS fans more than they are eva fans. It's kind of like the Tifosi (Ferrari fans), they like Ferrari more than Formula One. If the 2 Ferraris are out of the race they don't want to watch the rest of the race. I find this wrong for some reason. I'm an eva fan first and foremost.

[]:             Quote Post by The Invincible Shinji » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:10 pm Some of us are both Eva fans and A/S fans are we any less fans for wanting an A/S relationship?

[]:             Quote Post by DummyPlug » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:21 pm Not at all, it's just that you're not in that group. And I shouldn't have said it's wrong, it's not. BUT the problem is that people who do this will risk losing interest in Rebuild if things don't go the AxS way, or worse if Asuka is killed off.

[]:             Quote Post by The Invincible Shinji » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:29 pm My apologies. I see your point, i don't think people should lose interest in Rebuild either if it doesn't follow an A/S path. Anno likes to tease what can i say?

[]:             Quote Post by Kaname Langley » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:34 pm BattleMonkey wrote: I wouldn't be surprised if there is no kiss, the manga skipped out on it.... they probably wanna mix it up.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:34 pm I can't deny that I would be extremely pissed if they killed off Asuka in rebuild, but I would still watch the remaining movies. I'm an AS / Asuka fan because I'm an Evangelion fan, not the other way around. If for some reason AS gets subverted in Rebuild, that will be disappointing, but I will tolerate so I can enjoy the rest it, and get my AS fix somewhere else. Besides, there's not really any evidence that Asuka will die anyway, not is there evidence that the AS undertones will be subverted. If anything, there's evidence that Asuka and Shinji might actually be closer than they were in the original series.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Jun 26, 2009 8:40 pm oh my dear, we've decided to go back to this again (cue teh EPIC music) and you're welcome in advance for that backing track to what maybe a glorius thread that rivals those in the ANF archives anyway, I'll refresh everyone's memory for my take on A/S "shipping" since it's been too long and I gave conflicting statements back then to the "veterans" of this forum if any of them can remember in a single statement, for the most part, I don't care but notice how I said for the most part, not that I didn't care at all I still care for pretty much one reason and one reason only, the end of The EoE, "Kimochi warui", just Asuka/Shinji there on that beach with the floating remains of GNR in an ocean that seems to be suffering from harmful algal bloom a single question remains, even after all this time and that is: WTF? yeah, yeah, you have Rebuild looming larger everyday, but still, how does it end??????? I hope Anno-sensei goes "remodernist" if you know what I mean with the ending

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Fri Jun 26, 2009 9:27 pm I like AxS, think it makes an interesting couple though if they feel like deviating from this with this version, I would hope they try to pair him up with Mari as long as shes an interesting character. I just in no way can see or enjoy a pairing with Rei for so many factors, and the sheer boredom of the coupling. I'm really interested in seeing how Mari turns out.... don't shoot me

[]:             Quote Post by The Invincible Shinji » Fri Jun 26, 2009 10:07 pm We won't.

[]:             Quote Post by Megashadow13 » Fri Jun 26, 2009 10:09 pm BattleMonkey wrote: I like AxS, think it makes an interesting couple though if they feel like deviating from this with this version, I would hope they try to pair him up with Mari as long as shes an interesting character. I just in no way can see or enjoy a pairing with Rei for so many factors, and the sheer boredom of the coupling. I'm really interested in seeing how Mari turns out.... don't shoot me

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Fri Jun 26, 2009 10:21 pm I keep my expectations low. Really feel that with this truncated version of Eva with these movies, that they will concentrate much more on overall plot instead of spending time on the character interactions. The series and mangas being much longer and open gave them lots of room to explore the characters but these movies I think will sadly cut out any attempts at stuff like pairings.

[]:             Quote Post by Megashadow13 » Fri Jun 26, 2009 10:42 pm BattleMonkey wrote: I keep my expectations low. Really feel that with this truncated version of Eva with these movies, that they will concentrate much more on overall plot instead of spending time on the character interactions. The series and mangas being much longer and open gave them lots of room to explore the characters but these movies I think will sadly cut out any attempts at stuff like pairings.

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Fri Jun 26, 2009 10:51 pm If 3.0 and 4.0 are full length movies and such I could see it, but the supposed plan is that they are going to be shorter and played back to back like one long movie, which kills lot of hope I had for this Rebuild. If they would go with making 3.0 and 4.0 apart and both full length, I could see them working in some more stuff but with how 2.0 is sounding, I think things are gonna move fast.
